items.title: Ex-pro footballer, 36, who elbowed opponent in the face during penalty in shocking viral video is BANNED for five years
items.summary: AN EX-PROFESSIONAL footballer who was caught in viral footage elbowing an opponent during a game has been banned for five years. The video shows Thomas Taylor, 36, knocking out striker Danny Brookwell in a cowardly display of thuggery during the Ardal North West League match in Wales on 17 January.

items.summary: NEWCASTLE have made Ewen Jaouen their first summer signing for an initial £18.5million from Reims. The 6ft 6in French U21 goalkeeper passed a medical on Tyneside yesterday before penning a four-year contract. items.title: How has world changed since Scotland were last at men's finals?
items.summary: When Scotland last reached a men's World Cup, the Scottish parliament didn't exist, Google wasn't a thing and a pint of lager was roughly £1.90.

items.title: Why are so few women reaching the top in coaching?
items.summary: Hannah Dingley became the first female manager of a professional men's side in England in 2023 but she says more needs to be done to help women advance in coaching roles.

items.title: Golden goal: Siphiwe Tshabalala for South Africa v Mexico at the 2010 World Cup
items.summary: The World Cup did not save South Africa. But for one second, it showed us the country we wanted to be Before Siphiwe Tshabalala’s rocket from his left foot , before Peter Drury’s iconic commentary, before the wall of noise from thousands of vuvuzelas and before Shakira’s Waka Waka, there was Philip.
